name: I have a bad back already and hurt it worse on the machine—will comp cover?

mainEntity.name: I have a bad back already and hurt it worse on the machine—will comp cover?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, aggravation of pre-existing condition is compensable.** Utah law covers if work caused 'lighting up' of prior issues[1]. **Key factors:** Medical proof of work link needed. **Practical guidance:** Doctor document causation; report fully. Avoid insurer traps on pre-existing claims. Lawyer fights denials.
